Melania Trump says women 'need evidence' if they say they're victims - CNNPolitics

Melania Trump Says #MeToo Accusers 'Need to Show the Evidence'

MIT 真係厲害。連美國總統侵侵老婆都話#metoo要solid evidence先有用，metoo冇做到evidence的要求下，mit都可以就咁比左個award佢。對evidence的要求可以比一般人低咁多。
Metoo其實邊算disobedience? 而家女權喺西方國家咁大勢力，metoo只係一種順應政治正確而衍生嘅運動

https://www.media.mit.edu/posts/announcing-the-winners-of-the-2018-mit-media-lab-disobedience-award/

The MIT Media Lab’s 2018 Disobedience Award will be shared by three leaders of the #MeToo and #MeTooSTEM movement. Tarana Burke, founder of the “Me Too” Movement; BethAnn McLaughlin, who brought the “Me Too” conversation to STEM institutions; and Sherry Marts, who helps academic and nonprofit organizations become more fair and inclusive, have all taken a stand against sexual assault and harassment, and against the marginalization of survivors. The three winners will share the award’s $250,000 cash prize.


“This year’s winners embody the highest ideals of what the Disobedience Award is intended to honor: speaking truth to power, empowering the voiceless, accepting personal responsibility and fallout without a view to personal gain,” says Joi Ito, director of the Media Lab and co-founder of the award. “The #MeToo movement represents a sea change in American culture, in our institutions, in every professional, academic, and political arena. These three women are on the front lines of this movement, and their refusal to back down or be silenced is what will continue propelling the movement forward in the face of every kind of opposition. We have to support that kind of heroism.”

MIT 真係MIT
完全唔明

我地理解多數係9up / speak the false story 多
